'''CoreDataFiles''' was a news agency. [[Millennium Entertainments]] had a shareholder interest in the company.<ref name="HSCS" /> They produced the [[CFC-100]], a corporate watcher computer that tracked information on over 10,000 of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most important businesses.<ref name="GFT" />
